bio.Recent_Position: Peer Consultant at SSARC in Irvine, CA
bio.Involvements: Alpha Phi Omega, ASUCI, SSARC, UCI Counseling Center, Sacramento Internship Program, UCI Wind Ensemble, Anteater Band
bio.Bios: Hello! My name is Alina Tu, and I initiated in the fall quarter of my third year at UCI. In my free time, I enjoy traveling, hiking, rock climbing, hand-lettering, volunteering, and jamming out to music! A fun fact about myself is that I love the performing arts; I marched the baritone in the Santa Clara Vanguard Cadets ('16 and '17) and started tap-dancing since the first grade. Ask me about my study abroad experience at recruitment!
